hypotheses.expected_failure_mode: Cap becomes too small to matter.
hypotheses.expected_improvement: Limit drawdown and turnover damage from wrong direction.
hypotheses.kill_criteria: Reject if return/drawdown remains negative versus B0 or turnover/cost worsens without compensating benchmark-relative benefit.

hypotheses.changed_logic: Shrink active tilt toward baseline weights.
hypotheses.expected_improvement: Keep B3 closer to B0 when confidence is low.
hypotheses.kill_criteria: Reject if return/drawdown remains negative versus B0 or turnover/cost worsens without compensating benchmark-relative benefit.

hypotheses.changed_logic: Add persistence confirmation to RS state changes.
hypotheses.kill_criteria: Reject if return/drawdown remains negative versus B0 or turnover/cost worsens without compensating benchmark-relative benefit.

hypotheses.changed_logic: Smooth signal scores before target mapping.
hypotheses.expected_improvement: Reduce overreaction and repeated wrong-tilt dates.
hypotheses.kill_criteria: Reject if return/drawdown remains negative versus B0 or turnover/cost worsens without compensating benchmark-relative benefit.

hypotheses.changed_logic: Use a longer RS lookback before tilt scoring.
hypotheses.expected_failure_mode: Too slow to react after semiconductor leadership shifts.
hypotheses.expected_improvement: Reduce signal lag/noise from short relative-strength reversals.
hypotheses.kill_criteria: Reject if return/drawdown remains negative versus B0 or turnover/cost worsens without compensating benchmark-relative benefit.

hypotheses.changed_logic: Disable or shrink tilt when risk volatility is high.
hypotheses.expected_improvement: Avoid B3 direction errors during unstable markets.
hypotheses.kill_criteria: Reject if return/drawdown remains negative versus B0 or turnover/cost worsens without compensating benchmark-relative benefit.

hypotheses.changed_logic: Gate tilt by recent asset-level contribution evidence.
hypotheses.expected_improvement: Drop assets whose tilt contribution is persistently negative.
hypotheses.kill_criteria: Reject if return/drawdown remains negative versus B0 or turnover/cost worsens without compensating benchmark-relative benefit.

hypotheses.expected_failure_mode: Confidence proxy does not map to future contribution.
hypotheses.expected_improvement: Use confidence to scale tilt magnitude.
hypotheses.kill_criteria: Reject if return/drawdown remains negative versus B0 or turnover/cost worsens without compensating benchmark-relative benefit.

hypotheses.changed_logic: Diagnostic-only inversion test before any production-style redesign.
hypotheses.expected_failure_mode: Inversion overfits wrong-tilt dates and fails normal windows.
hypotheses.expected_improvement: Detect whether B3 signal direction is structurally reversed.
hypotheses.kill_criteria: Reject if normal-uptrend agreement worsens or turnover increases.

reader_brief.next_action: Manual owner/research review before any subsequent gate.
reader_brief.summary: B3 redesign hypotheses are ranked under frozen signal-direction constraints.
reader_brief.warnings: Research-only post-branch review; no B5/B6/v3, paper-shadow, broker/order or production action.
